title: Senior Doctor - Bayer India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Bayer India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Bayer India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Bayer India:
Bayer India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bayer India!
